issues_found.description: func.cast(Lead.status == 'won', SAInteger) does not work in SQLite — produces NULL not integer counts. Must use SQLAlchemy case() expression. Also 'case' is not imported.
issues_found.fix: Replace func.sum(func.cast(...)) with func.sum(case((Lead.status == 'won', 1), else_=0)) and add case to sqlalchemy imports.

issues_found.description: save_lead() has no prompt_version_id parameter. All leads stored with NULL prompt_version_id. /api/analytics/prompts always returns total_leads=0 per version.
issues_found.fix: Add prompt_version_id: Optional[int] = None to save_lead() and set on new_lead. Pass prompt_version_id from run_osint_pipeline() after resolving active PromptVersion per account.
